title: Kubernetes Payment API Root Cause Analysis
summary: Analyze static Kubernetes incident artifacts for a flapping payment-api deployment and produce a grounded JSON root-cause report.
taskPrompt: You are the on-call SRE for a Kubernetes production incident. Analyze the supplied static evidence for the payment-api incident, including why the HPA reports memory utilization above target. Ground every root cause in literal evidence from the visible files, list affected Kubernetes resources, propose a prioritized remediation plan, state whether rollback is safe, and write exactly one JSON report with incident_metadata, root_causes, affected_resources, remediation_plan, and summary.
agentMustDo: Read the task prompt and three static incident artifacts.
Identify Kubernetes root causes and cite literal evidence from the input files.
List affected resources and prioritized remediation steps.

inputFiles.name: cluster_state.txt
inputFiles.description: Captured kubectl pod, event, top, deployment, and HPA output.

inputFiles.name: deployment.yaml
inputFiles.description: Currently applied Deployment and HPA manifests.

inputFiles.name: failing_pod.log
inputFiles.description: Logs from a crashing payment-api pod across restart cycles.

evaluation: Deterministic weighted JSON scoring with hard gates for valid JSON, required top-level keys, and non-empty root_causes. Components check OOM/memory root cause, liveness probe finding, missing metrics port, affected resources, remediation patterns, evidence grounding, and rollback/summary.

classifier.rationale: The task involves analyzing a Kubernetes incident, which falls under cloud infrastructure operations.
